heading: Katerina Papaphilotheou
para1: Katerina is a graphic designer who found her true passion in the ancient craft of letterpress printing. She set up her studio in Limassol in 2012, drawn by the tactile beauty of type pressed deep into luxurious paper — a sensation no digital process can replicate.
para2: Every piece that leaves the studio carries the mark of the press: a slight indent, an honest impression, a reminder that something real was made here.
contact_lead: Whether you have a clear vision or just a feeling, Katerina is happy to talk through your project. Every enquiry gets personal attention.
